docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED AS TO PLFT MICHAEL PIMENTELLI. BUT FOR PURPOSES OF FILING SATIS IN SYSTEM, FILED UNDER DEFT MARAR RATHER THAN DEFT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
